descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 11-4 in opening game of Centennial Cup Western semifinal playoff series.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Red Deer Rustlers 11-4 on Tuesday night in the opening game of a best-of-seven Centennial Cup Western semifinal. Bill Hardy, Dave Tomlinson, and Matt Hervey each scored twice, with Jim Dunn, Tony Bobbitt, Jason Phillips, Mike McCormick, and Dean Rutledge also scoring. Richmond dominated with period leads of 4-2 and 6-3, and outshot Red Deer 60-34. The series continues in Richmond before moving to Red Deer.
